case.title: ODELL v. BAUSCH & LOMB OPTICAL CO

opinion.h1: ODELL v. BAUSCH & LOMB OPTICAL CO, 302 U.S. 756 (1937)
opinion.h2: Benjamin F. J. ODELL, petitioner, v. BAUSCH & LOMB OPTICAL COMPANY et al.* No. 557.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Benjamin F. J. Odell, of Chicago, Ill., pro se, for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 780, 58 S. Ct. 408, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Odell v. Bausch & Lomb Optical Co 302 U.S. 756 (1937) ]
